listeners.purpose: Fires a marketing::MarketingEvent for ad-network conversion attribution. Only when coupon.issuance_source IN ('referral', 'marketing_campaign'). Manual + import + api coupons skip. Reads discount_snapshot + issuance_context and forwards to the marketing module's MarketingEventCapturer with the source_amount_cents as the conversion value.

Fires the reversal marketing event when the original CouponRedeemed had fired a marketing event. Protects downstream ROAS + fraud-model training data by informing the ad network the conversion was reversed.
Same shape as CouponClawbackCompleted listener but for the admin-initiated manual reverse path (not a refund cascade). Fires the reversal marketing event.
Wave 4 bridge. Notifies finance::invoice module that a coupon reduced revenue on a specific invoice line. Powers the revenue-recognition adjustment on the invoice.
Wave 4 bridge. Notifies finance::invoice module to un-adjust the revenue-recognition when a redemption is clawed back.

Wave 5 bridge. When the redeemed coupon.issuance_source='referral': notify growth::referrals module that the referred user consumed the reward — this may progress the referral state (rewarded terminal state when reward materialization is via coupon usage rather than direct credit).
Wave 4 bridge. Dispatches ProcessCouponClawbackJob to reverse any CouponRedemption tied (via applied_to_type='invoice' + applied_to_id=refund.invoice_id) to the refunded invoice.
Higher-severity clawback path. Same shape as refund cascade but flags the redemption as chargeback-triggered (records the fraud signal on the customer profile for referrals module cross-reference).

Wave 5 bridge. When a ReferralReward.status transitions to vested AND its reward_type IN ('percent_discount', 'fixed_amount'): call CouponIssuer::issueForReferral() to produce a redeemable code with issuance_source='referral'.

Wave 4 bridge. When a MembershipPlan is archived: remove the archived plan from every Coupon.applicable_plan_ids. If the array becomes empty, transition the coupon to is_active=false with reason='applicable_plan_archived'.
GDPR minimisation. When a user is erased as the customer on any CouponRedemption: schedule 90-day-post-erasure redaction of customer_id + customer_type. Retention window unchanged.
Cascade delete via FK; writes compliance audit trail entry + emits count metrics. Invoice-linked redemptions migrate to compliance_archive.coupon_redemptions first.
